etymology.description: äşĽ(äşĽ, "gather") + ĺ†Š(ĺ†Š, "book") = gathering books or reading words in order -> order
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(äľ–) (lĂşn) combines äşĽ(äşĽ) (which can mean "gather" or suggest forming words with an opening like a mouth) with ĺ†Š(ĺ†Š) ("book") to symbolize the gathering or ordering of books or words, suggesting the notion of order.
